mcqs.question: What is the memory-efficient way to read a 5GB text file in Python?
options: Iterate over file object `for line in f:`
mcqs.explanation: Iterating over `f` streams lines one by one without loading entire file to RAM.

checkpoints.question: True or False: `open()` defaults to UTF-8 encoding on all operating systems.
checkpoints.explanation: False. On Windows it defaults to locale encoding (CP1252). Always specify `encoding='utf-8'`.
